records.m_Talk_ENG: *Huff* *Huff*
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Huff* *Huff*
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Huff* *Huff*

records.m_Talk_ENG: Let's go... this way.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Let's go... this way.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Let's go... this way.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Does it hurt?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Does it hurt?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Does it hurt?

records.m_Talk_ENG: No... I'm... okay.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No... I'm... okay.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No... I'm... okay.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...You're lying.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...You're lying.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...You're lying.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A bumpy green. Your heart is hurt. Lurcher had a similar color when it was tormented by the adults.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A bumpy green. Your heart is hurt. Lurcher had a similar color when it was tormented by the adults.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A bumpy green. Your heart is hurt. Lurcher had a similar color when it was tormented by the adults.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Shepherd...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Shepherd...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Shepherd...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sorry for lying to you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sorry for lying to you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sorry for lying to you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Let's go over there and get some rest.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Let's go over there and get some rest.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Let's go over there and get some rest.

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Pulse rate decreasing.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Pulse rate decreasing.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Pulse rate decreasing.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Breathing unstable. Body temperature decreasing.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Breathing unstable. Body temperature decreasing.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Breathing unstable. Body temperature decreasing.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Health deteriorating due to organ function declining and bleeding.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Health deteriorating due to organ function declining and bleeding.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Health deteriorating due to organ function declining and bleeding.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: Does it hurt...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Does it hurt...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Does it hurt...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm okay... I took medicine that helps with pain.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm okay... I took medicine that helps with pain.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm okay... I took medicine that helps with pain.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It says your life is in danger.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It says your life is in danger.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It says your life is in danger.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha... Don't mind the medical checks.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha... Don't mind the medical checks.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha... Don't mind the medical checks.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I just need some time to recharge. I'll be all right soon.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I just need some time to recharge. I'll be all right soon.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I just need some time to recharge. I'll be all right soon.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, Shepherd. Take this.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So, Shepherd. Take this.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So, Shepherd. Take this.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What is it...?.
records.m_Talk_DEU: What is it...?.
records.m_Talk_FRA: What is it...?.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's your birthday gift.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's your birthday gift.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's your birthday gift.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I wanted to open it with you on your birthday... but I don't think that's going to happen.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I wanted to open it with you on your birthday... but I don't think that's going to happen.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I wanted to open it with you on your birthday... but I don't think that's going to happen.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Shepherd's... birthday...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Shepherd's... birthday...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Shepherd's... birthday...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Shepherd, listen carefully to what I'm about to say.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Shepherd, listen carefully to what I'm about to say.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Shepherd, listen carefully to what I'm about to say.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I need to recharge, so... I won't be able to go with you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I need to recharge, so... I won't be able to go with you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I need to recharge, so... I won't be able to go with you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's okay. Shepherd doesn't have to leave too.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's okay. Shepherd doesn't have to leave too.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's okay. Shepherd doesn't have to leave too.

records.m_Talk_ENG: No, you must get out of here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No, you must get out of here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No, you must get out of here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So hold on to this gift and head to the address I mentioned before.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So hold on to this gift and head to the address I mentioned before.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So hold on to this gift and head to the address I mentioned before.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Can you do that for me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Can you do that for me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Can you do that for me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Shepherd wants to stay with you. Shepherd can wait.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Shepherd wants to stay with you. Shepherd can wait.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Shepherd wants to stay with you. Shepherd can wait.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Shepherd.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Shepherd.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Shepherd.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is an order from your commander.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is an order from your commander.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is an order from your commander.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This miserable place... must not be all that you remember.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This miserable place... must not be all that you remember.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This miserable place... must not be all that you remember.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Experience the better things life has to offer.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Experience the better things life has to offer.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Experience the better things life has to offer.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Please... Don't let me hold you back anymore.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Please... Don't let me hold you back anymore.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Please... Don't let me hold you back anymore.

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Ending visual recording</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Ending visual recording</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Ending visual recording</color>
